pages.focus: Cover page. Title treatment. Strong visual hook.
CHARACTER_A at her desk, surrounded by color-coded spreadsheets. She is labeling a label-maker.
CHARACTER_B bursts through the office door, phone in one hand, coffee in the other. Pure controlled chaos.
Establishing the office dynamic. Fast-paced back-and-forth. Ends on a visual hook: both characters staring at an empty calendar slot.
The fallout. CHARACTER_A scrambles. CHARACTER_B improvises. Two completely different crisis responses.
Chapter 2 splash. The office at night. Silent. Just a half-eaten sandwich on a desk.
Night shift. Only CHARACTER_A remains. She finds the letter. Slow, quiet pacing. 2-3 panels max.
Cliffhanger. CHARACTER_A looks up from the letter. Someone is at the door. We don't see who.
